author: orchestrator
summary: Completed the DuckDB data pipeline — Postgres-to-DuckDB export, persistent database file, corrected analytical views, and idempotent pipeline guard. The duckdb_query tool now returns real analytical data when OPENCODE_DUCKDB_PATH is configured.
deferred_seams: Integration tests with real duckdb binary (CI-gated)
blocking_defects_found_and_fixed: Views referenced non-existent columns (s.tags, m.tool_name) — fixed with jsonb extraction
Pipeline crash blocked app startup — fixed with Effect.forkIn(scope)
DuckDB path in wrong config module — fixed with new DuckDBConfig
False claim atom about testability — replaced with honest claim
unixepoch() SQLite function — fixed with duckdb epoch_ms()
INSERT OR REPLACE without PRIMARY KEY — fixed with PK constraint
Crash recovery freeze — fixed with CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE
No timeout on subprocesses — fixed with 60s timeout
No AbortSignal for fiber interruption — fixed with AbortController
Postgres-only ::text casts — fixed with CAST(... AS text)
